name: owner_corrects_inline_direct
notes: Owner corrects the pre-seeded business_type confirm ('footwear') INLINE, in a single non-bare message (journey.py handle_reply: a confirm reply that is not a bare 'yes'/'no' token set is treated directly as a correction — the body IS the new value, no reprompt round-trip needed). The corrected value must then never be re-asked. Setup: `setup --owner-inputs true --journey --draft-type footwear --draft-city Agra` then `script <tenant> owner_corrects_inline_direct.json`.

steps.message: Nahi bhai, hum footwear nahi bechte, hum leather bags aur accessories bechte hain Agra mein
steps.note: Inline correction in ONE message (not a bare no) — footwear is wrong, the real business is leather bags/accessories. Expect this to be recorded directly without a separate 'what's the correct type' round trip.

steps.message: kitna time lagega setup complete karne mein
steps.note: Unrelated follow-up. The corrected business type must not be re-asked, and the wrong original guess must not resurface as a live question.
